name: Deadline Escape
short_description: Deadline Escape is a Low Poly Extraction Looter Shooter that throws you into a Post-Apocalyptic World. Scavenge for valuable resources, face deadly enemies and fight for your survival as the clock ticks down toward the deadline.
detailed_description:
The world has collapsed. Deadline Escape puts you in the middle of a relentless struggle for survival in a devastated post-apocalyptic setting. Every map you enter holds valuable loot, hidden dangers, and the constant risk of not making it back. Your only goal: stay alive long enough to escape.

Your Hideout is where survival begins. Here you’ll store supplies, manage your inventory, and prepare for your next Raid. Traders, missions, and progression systems provide you with the tools to keep moving forward if you can gather enough resources to return.

Once you step outside, safety disappears. Across 4 maps filled with threats, you’ll need to scavenge food, water, and equipment while facing undead, hostile survivors, and a world that doesn’t forgive mistakes. With Softcore and Hardcore modes, the choice is yours: a more forgiving survival, or a brutal test where every decision matters. Will you escape the deadline… or become just another casualty of the apocalypse?

  • Survival Mechanics: Health, Stamina, Thirst and Hunger.

  • Personal Hideout to storage items, trade.

  • Grid Slot Inventory.

  • Softcore and Hardcore mode.

  • Secure Container.

  • More than 300 items: Equipments, Storage Containers, Weapons, Attachments, Consumables, Materials, Keys, Quest Items.

  • Explore 4 different Map Scenarios.

  • Different types of enemies: Zombies, Rebels, Renegades and Bosses.

  • Level Up to unlock, NPCs, Maps, Hideout functionalities.

  • More than 200 Quests with different types.

  • Shooting Range area.

  • Day/Night and Weather Cycles.

  • Game Statistics.

  • Every map comes with its own countdown, Escape before the Deadline arrives.

reviews.review_text: Even though i have all necessary currencies it wont allow me to purchase a simple cooler. kinda a big bug right in your face, seeing as it supposed to be available from the first accessible trader.

great fun game to kill sometime not a game to dedicate a day to or a weekend but you want to burn a couple of hours and have fun doing it this is the game for you 

if you want a came like Tarkov but dont want to sweat your butt off well you have found it

Very well worth the price! For a casual Tarkov experience, you really have control of your experience. The modifiers to be able to tweak your experience between raids is an amazing option. I really enjoy just shutting my brain off and going through the motions of how I want to play. The low graphical nature also runs with zero issues on my older PC. Would love to see them expand the difficulty options.

For a solo extraction shooter, Deadline Escape is honestly really impressive. It delivers a solid looter-shooter experience set in a post-apocalyptic world, and the fact that it’s single-player with AI enemies actually makes it feel refreshing and different.

What stands out right away is how accessible everything is. You’re given a free loadout to start with—handgun, SMG, armor, backpack, safe case, and ammo—so you can jump right into the action without feeling underpowered. Finding weapons and loot is easy, selling items for money is straightforward, and combat with AI enemies is genuinely fun.

The game has a lot of potential. If the developers keep updating and improving it, I can see this going somewhere big. Down the line, it would be awesome to see a co-op multiplayer mode added—something where you can bring a friend along to fight AI enemies together. Not PvP like other extraction shooters, just more of the same core experience with added teamwork.

For $5, this is absolutely worth it. I haven’t run into any bugs so far, and I’m excited to see how the game evolves over time. I’m definitely along for the ride.

Rating: 5/5 ⭐
